name: Colonization Simulator
short_description: Colonize rich planets with vegetation or deserted moons. Build a functional and prosperous colony. Take care of your colonists. Experience adventures on distant worlds or build a colony on planets in our solar system.
detailed_description:
Colonize rich planets with vegetation or deserted moons. Build a functional and prosperous colony. Take care of your colonists. Experience adventures on distant worlds or build a colony on planets in our solar system.

Colonization Simulator gives you the opportunity to colonize many planets that have different climates, fauna, flora and conditions for colonization.

Take care of your colonists and develop them professionally. You can choose specialisations and assign different tasks. Invent new technologies and improve your colony.

On unknown planets, you'll encounter different animals, alien civilizations and have many adventures. While managing your colony, you'll be faced with many decisions that will affect how the colony runs.

What you will find in the game

- The opportunity to colonize different planets

- many planets and moons of our solar system

- distant worlds rich in vegetation and animals

- encounters with alien civilizations

- many species of animals on planets where life thrives

- exploration

- concern for the colonists, the possibility of their specialization

- trade in raw materials

- planetary exploration
